summary: Retain the decisive final DOM state when the cold full-cache transition times out.

decisions.decision: Keep the 15-second cold-cache oracle bound and strict cached-full acceptance criteria unchanged, but include the click phase, visible status, preview-badge presence, Full-render disabled state, and before/after Console run counts in any timeout error.
decisions.rationale: The exact clean run at 7a2c1d0 failed after restart but the generic timeout discarded the state needed to distinguish a missed click, cache miss, engine run, or stale preview badge. Retaining only fixed-shape non-sensitive DOM facts makes the next bounded run diagnostic without weakening or retrying the gate.

testEvidence.criterion: A cached-paint timeout must preserve its decisive final DOM state.
testEvidence.test: Execute the production cachedPaint script against a stuck cached-preview fixture with the 15-second timer bounded to five milliseconds and assert the exact diagnostic error.

red.outcome: RED: 1 failed and 20 passed because the timeout returned only the generic error and omitted all final-state fields.

green.outcome: GREEN: 21/21 passed; the exact fixed-shape timeout evidence was retained.

nearMisses.sought: Exact clean packaged native M4 cold-start cache evidence
nearMisses.confirmation: The run passed native cube, binary STL, MCP, exact target thumbnail, and process-restart checks, then failed the strict cold cached-full transition with only a generic timeout; host cleanup passed.

questions: No owner decision is required; this is evidence retention for the existing strict gate.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
